data.name: Hentai World Winter
data.detailed_description:
Dive into an enchanting puzzle adventure where you bring together mesmerizing images of sexy girls. Assemble the pieces to reveal vibrant and delightful illustrations that are bound to captivate your imagination.

The game showcases a variety of beautifully designed characters, challenging you to strategically swap and align puzzle pieces. As you progress, you’ll uncover even more breathtaking artwork, all at a leisurely pace without the pressure of time constraints.

With its straightforward yet engaging mechanics, this game offers endless entertainment, making it the ideal choice for a relaxing and enjoyable pastime.

Key Features:

Gorgeous illustrations of charming girls accompanied by soothing background music.

Unlock a full-view mode to fully appreciate each image after completing a level.

Numerous levels with diverse difficulty settings to keep the gameplay exciting and immersive.

data.short_description: This is an engaging game featuring stunning and charming girls. Dive into the jigsaw puzzle mechanics, arranging pieces to unveil the complete image of these captivating characters.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典文*, 泰文*, 繁體中文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 3.4 GHz Dual Core Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
